prompt_used: Story: Tape 17: Pinewatch (tape-17-pinewatch) | Hook: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight. | Subgenre: found-footage investigation | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels | Villain: The Editor | Villain worldview: Reality is editable if fear is timed correctly. | Motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens.
